title: cyclosorus assamicus
intro: Cyclosorus assamicus, also known as Assam Brake Fern, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae, characterized by its small to medium-sized fronds and distinctive leaf patterns. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Cyclosorus assamicus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or dried powder, and is said to be effective in treating a range of ailments when consumed as a tea or tonic.
